plan.name: Plan 2026 - App creation and testing
plan.description: This app is for making plans and keeping track of tasks, sharing tasks and plans with others.

tasks.title: Remove the logo webp transparent extra space
tasks.content: The image when added as a Url athttps://plan2026-pi.vercel.app/_next/image?url=%2Fplan2026-logo-c.png&w=128&q=75 is off center from vercel url is appearing off center due to a weird transparent upper and left border in the image. I believe it is also making the topmost header of the app have a taller top margin than expected

tasks.title: Plans edit page mobile friendly
tasks.content: The plan edit page is not mobile friendly. Can we examine how to make things work on small screens? Perhaps make the input boxes scale vertically when there is longer input? Things need to be pushed together vertically and not extend so far horizontally in mobile view for the task edit form.

tasks.title: Urgency and % complete placement on plan form, slider bar
tasks.content: move the urgency of a plan to the top of the edit form, also move the % complete to the top and change the % complete to a slider bar. Use a graphic to display it on the plans list instead of just 0% or 52%. goal is to make it appealing to finish with like a thermometer or coloured triangle from min 0 to max 100% complete

tasks.title: Add supply list
tasks.content:
I want to be able to create a list of necessary supplies for either a plan or a task. We need to add a new tab called 'List' that will be like a shopping list. Each item on the list can have optional price, description, link (ie Amazon)

This should produce a 'cost' for the task and plan displaying the total cost of all associated items.

tasks.title: Onboarding/ login screen
tasks.content: Want to improve the onboarding screen for new users. Use this as inspiration: https://www.xda-developers.com/i-asked-gemini-claude-and-chatgpt-to-create-a-website-and-there-was-one-obvious-winner/

tasks.title: Add task button on the task list of a plan scrolling
tasks.content: In mobile view the add task button on the task list is too far to the right, need to keep it in view

tasks.title: Fix translation
tasks.content: Some pidgin translations are wrong, example is Waka for tasks, it seems like woaka is better or maybe 'work' instead. Suggest ways our translations can be verified. This mistranslation to 'waka' is problematic because it is a swear word in Nigerian pidgin.

tasks.title: make X of Y completed a graphic
tasks.content: on the main plans page, I would like to change the X of Y completed into a graphic, I'm thinking like a bunch of boxes marked green and red for completed / not completed tasks within the plan. Need to make some concepts for this.

tasks.title: Fix how the task date and associated plan are displayed on mobile view, one per line
tasks.content: Deadline, start date and associated plan are displayed on mobile view, one per line. Simplify the dates and times displayed in mobile. Move the status button to the left of the edit button

tasks.title: Modify color attribute to flags
tasks.content: Change the color plan attribute to flags, display a color flag on the plans list.

tasks.title: Help pages
tasks.content: Want to add a help page on how to use this app, let's start with just a basic help section for tasks and plans, with instructions on how to use the app. The help section should also have an app versioning history based on the changelog and an about section showing this apps version and contributor info.

tasks.title: Allow mark as done to tasks in the plan edit page
Add facebook login
tasks.content: Like the existing google login system, I would like to explore using facebook or other identity providers for sign up / sign in. Additionally what would be needed to allow signup with email/password?

tasks.title: AI advice on plans
tasks.content: How could I integrate AI advice bot onto a plan? Something that would automatically review the plan, associated tasks and provide advice and next steps for the plan

tasks.title: Add a calendar tab and new page
tasks.content: A calendar to show tasks and ongoing projects. This will be called schedule and added as a new upper tab and page. Compare using a plug-in or import for this versus building all from scratch.

tasks.title: Get permanent website
tasks.content: Look at switching to permanent address on vercel

tasks.title: Print checklist from plan
tasks.content: Able to print a checklist from an open plan containing the list of unfinished tasks sorted by priority.

tasks.title: Start with a prebuilt plan
tasks.content: Ability to choose a prebuilt plan from a template.

tasks.title: Share to social media / external plans
tasks.content: Able to share plan or task externally, the link produced should bring the recipient (even if not signed in) to a public view page where they can set the task status only other task information should be displayed read only. Make sure to secure the endpoint used for public (unauthenticated user) to change status of the task and add it to their calendar. We will also want to let the user add their email or sign up for an account via standard flow. Only allow access to plans and tasks that the owner has linked to be public.

tasks.title: New task no date - should be blank by default
Mobile app
tasks.content: Create an Android and iOS app for plan 2026. Should use the existing site to implement

tasks.title: Move tasks up in plan, sort completed tasks lower
tasks.content: Tasks should be displayed more prominently on the plans page. Move completed tasks to the bottom of the task list in plans

tasks.title: Mail sent button after creating link
tasks.content: After creating a link, beside the copy button a new button should create a mail to action with title something like "you're invited to plan: (name of linked plan". The email body should contain some details about the plan, the link to the plan and other reasonable information about the email invite to encourage accessing the plan

tasks.title: Mobile add /  edit task form bug
tasks.content: Tasks further down the list when opening the edit form should be visible right away, you shouldnt have to scroll up to edit a task. From both the task list and inside a plan.

tasks.title: Add task dialogue from plans page
tasks.content: I want to be able to add tasks from the plans page using the full tasks dialogue. Not having to add then save.

tasks.title: share tasks and plans
tasks.content: ability to share tasks and plans with another user.

tasks.title: Translation to french and pigin
tasks.content: Allow users to set their language to french and Nigerian pidgin

tasks.title: seach engine optimization
tasks.content: Optimize the app for search engine optimization

tasks.title: Send invite to plan
tasks.content: Ability to forward invitations to other users to join a plan. How can we securely allow two users to work on one plan

tasks.title: Upload files Consider blob storage
tasks.content: Need file upload

tasks.title: Mobile ui fixes
tasks.content: Several of the list display items do not show up correctly or wrap awkwardly in mobile view

tasks.title: export plan and tasks
tasks.content: ability to export plans and tasks as json or another export option?

tasks.title: deploy to vercel
tasks.content: https://plan2026-pi.vercel.app/
